title: Overflow Pet Levels
description: Shows the overflow pet level on your pets in Hypixel Skyblock.
body:
This mod shows you the overflow pet xp of your Hypixel Skyblock pets. It uses the same xp scale that the Golden Dragon pet uses, 1,886,700 per [level above 102](https://wiki.hypixel.net/Golden_Dragon_Pet#:~:text=own%2E-,Leveling).

Also works on non legendary pets, and shows what level they would be at legendary.

![Endermite pet level 160](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1ba3839d0e81b640f05874558ff61e66d5bb267.png)
